anchors.mc_alignment_action: Use this to start visual review; for non-text anchors still re-pick and confirm the exact MC entrance, sign, or boundary before route certification.

alignment_v2_summary.filter: nearest clean-v3 standable column excluding white, natural, empty, and non-passable columns within 64 blocks
alignment_v2_summary.claim_boundary: Projected review coordinates only; no exact anchor, route, task, or benchmark certification.

alignment_v3_summary.warp_control_policy: IDW residual warp makes the five visible MC text/landmark controls exact in x/z before clean filtering; linked MC text anchors use their sign waypoint coordinate_override directly.
alignment_v3_summary.claim_boundary: Label-anchored review coordinates only; MC text waypoints identify visible signs but non-text anchors are not exact entrances, routes, tasks, or benchmark admissions.
